samples.xml_description: Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers. Clock signal. Reset signal. Sign bit (1 for signed). 16-bit input operand (dividend). 16-bit input operand (divisor). Valid operation signal. Ready for result signal. Result valid signal. 16-bit output result. 0 1 2 3 4 Counter for division process. Start count flag. Negative divisor. Shift register for division process. Initialize the internal states and registers. Division process using shift register. Check if the division process is done. Perform division process. Check if the division process is done. Perform subtraction. Manage the res_valid signal. Reset the res_valid signal. Set the res_valid signal. Set the res_valid signal.
